title: ESP32-WROOM NPN low-side load switch
prompt: My ESP32-WROOM-32 needs to switch a small 5 V resistive load (a buzzer element) that draws more than the GPIO can handle. Use an NPN transistor as a low-side switch driven from a GPIO through a base resistor, with the load between 5 V and the collector and the emitter to ground. Firmware activates it; assume it's on for the bench test.
